Class Student

java.lang.Object
models.User
models.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<User>, GradeObserver
Direct Known Subclasses:
BachelorStudent
public class Student extends User implements GradeObserver
Represents an enrolled student in the university system.

A Student extends User and additionally:

  • Tracks registered Courses and the associated Marks.
  • Calculates a 4.0-scale GPA from accumulated marks.
  • Implements GradeObserver to receive real-time grade notifications.
  • Enforces academic rules: maximum credit load (21) and maximum number of failed courses (3).
See Also:
  • Course
  • Mark
  • GradeObserver
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • Student

      public Student(String id, String firstName, String lastName, String username, String passwordHash, String major, int yearOfStudy)
      Constructs a new Student with the given identity and academic details.
      Parameters:
      id - unique user identifier
      firstName - student's first name
      lastName - student's last name
      username - login username
      passwordHash - SHA-256 hex digest of the password
      major - academic major / department
      yearOfStudy - current year of study (must be ≥ 1)

  • Method Details

    • getRole

      public String getRole()
      Returns the role label for this user (e.g. "STUDENT", "TEACHER"). Subclasses must provide a concrete implementation.
      Specified by:
      getRole in class User
      Returns:
      always "STUDENT"

    • canRegister

      public boolean canRegister(Course course)
      Checks whether this student is eligible to register for the given course.

      Registration is allowed when all three conditions hold:

      1. The student is not already registered for course.
      2. Adding the course's credits would not exceed 21.
      3. The student has fewer than 3 failed courses.
      Parameters:
      course - the course to check
      Returns:
      true if registration is permitted

    • approveCourseRegistration

      public void approveCourseRegistration(Course course)
      Adds the course to this student's registered list without any eligibility checks. Use only after approval has already been verified (e.g., by canRegister(Course)).
      Parameters:
      course - the course to register (ignored if already registered)

    • getTotalCredits

      public int getTotalCredits()
      Returns the total number of credit hours across all registered courses.
      Returns:
      sum of credits, or 0 if no courses are registered

    • addOrUpdateMark

      public void addOrUpdateMark(Mark mark)
      Stores or replaces the Mark for a course. The mark is keyed by its course name.
      Parameters:
      mark - the mark to store (must not be null)

    • getMark

      public Optional<Mark> getMark(String courseName)
      Looks up the mark for the given course.
      Parameters:
      courseName - name of the course
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the mark, or empty if no mark exists

    • getFailedCoursesCount

      public int getFailedCoursesCount()
      Counts the courses in which this student has received a final mark but did not pass.
      Returns:
      number of failed courses

    • rateTeacher

      public void rateTeacher(String teacherUsername, int rating)
      Records this student's rating for a teacher. Calling this method again for the same teacher overwrites the previous rating.
      Parameters:
      teacherUsername - the username of the teacher being rated
      rating - integer rating from 1 (lowest) to 5 (highest)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if rating is not in [1, 5]

    • calculateGpa

      public double calculateGpa()
      Calculates and returns the student's current GPA on a 4.0 scale.

      Each recorded mark is individually converted to the 4.0 scale with convertToGpa(double), and the results are averaged.

      Returns:
      GPA in [0.0, 4.0], or 0.0 if no marks are recorded

    • getTranscript

      public String getTranscript()
      Builds a formatted transcript listing every course with its total mark, pass/fail status, and the overall GPA at the bottom.
      Returns:
      multi-line transcript string

    • onGradeUpdated

      public void onGradeUpdated(String studentId, String courseName, double totalMark)
      Called by the grading subsystem whenever a total mark is updated for this student. Stores a human-readable notification message in the student's notification list.
      Specified by:
      onGradeUpdated in interface GradeObserver
      Parameters:
      studentId - ID of the student whose grade changed
      courseName - name of the affected course
      totalMark - updated total score (0–100)

    • getMajor

      public String getMajor()
      Returns the student's academic major.
      Returns:
      major string (e.g. "Computer Science")

    • getYearOfStudy

      public int getYearOfStudy()
      Returns the student's current year of study.
      Returns:
      year (1-based)

    • setYearOfStudy

      public void setYearOfStudy(int yearOfStudy)
      Updates the year of study (e.g. after promotion).
      Parameters:
      yearOfStudy - new year value

    • getRegisteredCourses

      public List<Course> getRegisteredCourses()
      Returns an unmodifiable snapshot of the student's registered courses.
      Returns:
      list of registered courses (never null)

    • getMarksByCourseName

      public Map<String,Mark> getMarksByCourseName()
      Returns an unmodifiable snapshot of the student's marks, keyed by course name.
      Returns:
      map of course name → mark

    • getRatedTeachers

      public Map<String,Integer> getRatedTeachers()
      Returns an unmodifiable snapshot of teacher ratings given by this student.
      Returns:
      map of teacher username → rating (1–5)

    • getNotifications

      public List<String> getNotifications()
      Returns an unmodifiable snapshot of all grade-update notifications received.
      Returns:
      list of notification strings
